name: 1.5" SSD1351 RGB OLED Module (128x128, SPI, Waveshare)
description: Waveshare 1.5 inch 128x128 RGB OLED module (SSD1351), SPI 7-pin vertical header on the left edge (VCC GND DIN CLK CS DC RST top to bottom), 44.5x37mm board, four 2.0mm holes. Second 1.25mm SMD wafer on back carries the same signals.
dimensions_source: Waveshare official size drawing + 3D STEP (parsed): board 44.5x37 R1.5, holes D2.0 at 2.5 insets (39.5x32.0 STEP-exact), 1x7 2.54 header column 2.25 from left edge (pins y-centered, STEP-exact), glass 33.8x34.0, AA 26.855 sq.
